PowerShell($dir = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nvim-data\\site\\pack\\core\\opt\\nvim-treesitter"; Write-Output "Exists: $\(Test-Path $dir\)"; if \(Test-Path $dir\) { Write-Output "Items:"; Get-ChildItem $dir -Force | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Name\) \($\($_.Length\)\)" } })

PowerShell(nvim --headless -c 'lua local ok, err = pcall\(require, "nvim-treesitter.config"\); print\("treesitter: " .. tostring\(ok and "OK" or err\)\)' -c 'lua local ok, err = pcall\(require, "blink.cmp"\); print\("blink.cmp: " .. tostring\(ok and "OK" or err\)\)' -c 'lua local ok, err = pcall\(require, "mason"\); print\("mason: " .. tostring\(ok and "OK" or err\)\)' -c 'lua local ok, err = pcall\(require, "mason-lspconfig"\); print\("mason-lspconfig: " .. tostring\(ok and "OK" or err\)\)' -c 'lua local ok, err = pcall\(require, "telescope"\); print\("telescope: " .. tostring\(ok and "OK" or err\)\)' -c 'lua local ok, err = pcall\(require, "lualine"\); print\("lualine: " .. tostring\(ok and "OK" or err\)\)' -c 'quit' 2>&1)

PowerShell(nvim --headless -c 'lua print\("flash: " .. \(pcall\(require, "flash"\) and "OK" or "FAIL"\)\); print\("gitsigns: " .. \(pcall\(require, "gitsigns"\) and "OK" or "FAIL"\)\); print\("nvim-tree: " .. \(pcall\(require, "nvim-tree"\) and "OK" or "FAIL"\)\); print\("Comment: " .. \(pcall\(require, "Comment"\) and "OK" or "FAIL"\)\); print\("nvim-autopairs: " .. \(pcall\(require, "nvim-autopairs"\) and "OK" or "FAIL"\)\); print\("toggleterm: " .. \(pcall\(require, "toggleterm"\) and "OK" or "FAIL"\)\); print\("lspkind: " .. \(pcall\(require, "lspkind"\) and "OK" or "FAIL"\)\); print\("dap \(should fail\): " .. \(pcall\(require, "dap"\) and "LOADED" or "NOT LOADED \(lazy\)"\)\)' -c 'quit' 2>&1)

PowerShell(nvim --headless -c 'lua print\("dap \(should be nil\): " .. \(pcall\(require, "dap"\) and "LOADED" or "NOT LOADED \(lazy\)"\)\); print\("dapui \(should be nil\): " .. \(pcall\(require, "dapui"\) and "LOADED" or "NOT LOADED \(lazy\)"\)\); print\("dap-vscode-js: " .. \(pcall\(require, "dap-vscode-js"\) and "LOADED" or "NOT LOADED \(lazy\)"\)\); print\("dap-virtual-text: " .. \(pcall\(require, "nvim-dap-virtual-text"\) and "LOADED" or "NOT LOADED \(lazy\)"\)\)' -c 'quit' 2>&1)

PowerShell(nvim --headless -c 'lua print\("=== Module Loading ==="\); for _, m in ipairs\({"nvim-treesitter.config", "blink.cmp", "mason", "mason-lspconfig", "telescope", "lualine", "flash", "gitsigns", "nvim-tree", "Comment", "nvim-autopairs", "toggleterm", "lspkind", "lspconfig", "nvim-web-devicons", "editorconfig", "plenary"}\) do local ok, err = pcall\(require, m\); print\(m .. ": " .. \(ok and "OK" or "FAIL: " .. tostring\(err\)\)\) end; print\("=== Lazy-loaded \(should fail\) ==="\); print\("dap: " .. \(pcall\(require, "dap"\) and "LOADED" or "LAZY"\)\); print\("dapui: " .. \(pcall\(require, "dapui"\) and "LOADED" or "LAZY"\)\); print\("=== Lockfile ==="\); print\("lockfile: " .. \(vim.fn.filereadable\("nvim-pack-lock.json"\) == 1 and "EXISTS" or "MISSING"\)\); print\("=== No errors above means SUCCESS ==="\)' -c 'quit' 2>&1)

PowerShell(Remove-Item -Recurse -Force "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nvim-data\\site\\pack\\core\\opt\\blink.cmp" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Force "E:\\Workspace\\dotfiles\\Neovim\\nvim\\nvim-pack-lock.json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Cleaned blink.cmp for reinstall")

PowerShell(cd "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nvim-data\\site\\pack\\core\\opt\\blink.cmp"; git branch -a 2>&1; Write-Output "---"; git log --oneline -3 2>&1; Write-Output "---"; cd "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nvim-data\\site\\pack\\core\\opt\\blink.lib"; git log --oneline -3 2>&1)
PowerShell(cd "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nvim-data\\site\\pack\\core\\opt\\blink.cmp"; git fetch origin main 2>&1; git log origin/main --oneline -5 2>&1)

PowerShell(nvim --headless -c 'lua print\("=== blink.cmp v2 ==="\); local ok, cmp = pcall\(require, "blink.cmp"\); print\("blink.cmp: " .. \(ok and "OK" or \("FAIL: " .. tostring\(cmp\)\)\)\); print\("=== Key modules ==="\); for _, m in ipairs\({"blink.cmp", "blink.lib"}\) do local ok, err = pcall\(require, m\); print\(m .. ": " .. \(ok and "OK" or "FAIL"\)\) end' -c 'quit' 2>&1)

": " .. \(ok and "OK" or "FAIL"\)\) end' -c 'quit' 2>&1)

PowerShell(nvim --headless -c 'lua local mods = {"plenary", "nvim-web-devicons", "Comment", "nvim-autopairs", "template-string", "lualine", "gitsigns", "nvim-treesitter.config", "flash", "nvim-tree", "telescope", "toggleterm", "blink.lib", "blink.cmp", "lspkind", "mason"}; for _, m in ipairs\(mods\) do print\(m .. PowerShell(nvim --headless -c 'lua print\("blink.cmp: " .. \(pcall\(require, "blink.cmp"\) and "OK \(native\)" or "FAIL"\)\); local f = io.open\(vim.fn.stdpath\("data"\) .. "/site/lib/libblink_cmp_fuzzy.dll.2ef3db1"\); print\("native lib: " .. \(f and "FOUND" or "MISSING"\)\); if f then f:close\(\) end' -c 'quit' 2>&1)
